sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32756" key="e)kpriste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκ-πριστέον</orth>, <sense id="n32756.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must saw out, excise,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antyll.</author> </bibl> ap.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:44:23:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44.23.20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
